raw:
Welcome to my blog!

I'm Rickee, currently working as an interbank FX trader in Hong Kong. However

---

### My Work?

- Mainly CNH/USD and HKD/CNH CCS.

- Not a work blog here. I prefer keep this blog unstressed and say things other than finance. However, peers in the industry are always welcome. :-)

### My hobby?

- Basically everything about music. Piano? jYes.

- Piano. (and recently JAZZ improvision very much), Choir (once a piano accompany), A capella (email me and we can make noises!)

- All sorts of outdoor activities. Eg.: hiking (now planning a trip to the Mount Everest!), sailing (former member of Voilà Sailing Club), enjoying the air-con in supermarkets (wait this is en fait indoor)

- Do things on a whim (like this website 😉)!

- Dive in random researches on a whim (like these topics 😉)!

### I dream of:

- Living a million vibrant lives (while awake!)

- Justice and Peace.
